arts.ttl: Ten Hag NOT a candidate to replace Sahin at Dortmund, per local publication
arts.sum: Contrary to previous reports, Erik ten Hag is not an option to replace Nuri Sahin should he lose his job as Borussia Dortmund coach, according to Ruhr Nachrichten.
Borussia Dortmund's young midfielder Kjell Wätjen has reportedly attracted interest from Bochum.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund face competition from Juventus for Chelsea’s Renato Veiga

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund aim to sign Manchester United’s Marcus Rashford this week
arts.sum: According to Bild, Borussia Dortmund are aiming to sign Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford by the end of this week. It had previously been reported that BvB were looking into…

arts.ttl: Report: Nuri Şahin’s Last Chance Against Bologna; Erik ten Hag, Sebastian Hoeneß on BVB’s Shortlist
arts.sum: He also states that the club has already considered who could be Şahin’s replacement as BVB head coach, with Erik ten Hag and Sebastian Hoeneß both on the shortlist. Nuri Şahin is running out of time, and the club are already considering who could replace him.
